args.message: Welcome! You're looking at this iconic 2014 Jeep Wrangler Sport, an absolute gem for your next adventure! With its durable 3.6L V6 engine, this 4x4 has been well-maintained and is ready to hit the trails. The removable top and doors make it perfect for those sunny days ahead. At just 118,000 miles, it's in good shape and priced at $19,995 — a fantastic deal for a vehicle like this!
